expectations.text: Creates ChatRoom service with ZIO Hub.unbounded for broadcasting
expectations.evidence: ChatRoom case class with Hub[ChatMessage], Hub.unbounded created - same as with-skill version

expectations.text: Stores message history in Ref and retrieves it on new connections
expectations.evidence: Ref[List[ChatMessage]] for history, getMessages retrieves it correctly

expectations.text: Implements two-phase SSE: sends history first (ElementPatchMode.Inner), then streams new messages (ElementPatchMode.Append)
expectations.evidence: Two-phase SSE pattern correctly implemented with Inner for history and Append for new messages

expectations.text: POST endpoint uses readSignals[T] to read form data (username and message)
expectations.evidence: req.readSignals[MessageRequest] used correctly with Schema derivation

expectations.text: HTML has signals (dataSignals) and dataBind for username and message inputs
expectations.evidence: Signals properly declared and bound with dataSignals and dataBind

expectations.text: Uses dataInit to auto-trigger SSE endpoint on page load
expectations.evidence: dataInit correctly triggers GET /chat/messages endpoint on page load

expectations.text: Provides ChatRoom.layer to the server via Server.provide
Displays messages with username and timestamp
expectations.evidence: messageTemplate renders username and formatted timestamp for each message

notes: PERFECT implementation - all 8 assertions passed! Identical to with-skill version. Without any skill guidance, agent correctly implemented: ChatRoom service with Hub, two-phase SSE, readSignals[T], signals with dataBind, dataInit, and service injection. This shows the agent has strong foundational ZIO HTTP knowledge.
